verse_text: And I shall bring the remaining third through the fire, and I shall try them as silver is tried, and I will prove them as gold itself is proven. He will call upon My name, and I will hear him, and I will say, 'This is My people,' and they will say, 'The Lord is my God.' '

links.context: Only vegetation is affected. The seventh plague in Egypt is recalled ([[EXO.9:22]]-26; see also [[EZK.5:12]]; [[ZEC.13:8]], [[ZEC.13:9]]). The reference to blood most likely comes from Joel (3:3; see [[ACT.2:19]]). A mixture of hail, fire, and blood is a typical apocalyptic picture of judgment.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
